title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PolicyBazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PolicyBazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the PolicyBazaar family as a Backend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PolicyBazaar:
PolicyBazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar!
